data.content: Shipment review on 2026-03-12 rejected the shipment. Verified current origin/main tip 301dca8197da has a green CI run (23001643023) and still contains commit 63c9ce7d5059, but the later approved implementation commit 3b1290788d0b is not on origin/main. Its changes were the semantic per-command color accents, FORCE_COLOR support for help rendering, and src/lib/__tests__/help-cli.test.ts coverage. Because the shipped code on main does not match the implementation approved in ready_for_implementation_review, this is a deployment/shipment issue and the knot is returned to ready_for_shipment for an actual shipment of 3b1290788d0b or an equivalent commit.
